A1V12 Yahoo Production v3.4

Binary MGK/MGV tactical sleeve · Unified adjusted-close total return · All series comparable · Dividends reported separately
All series use adjusted-close total return (distributions reinvested). Tactical sleeve, VOO benchmark, and all model allocations are directly comparable. Dividend income shown separately below.
Tactical signals use Raw closing prices (see SIGNAL_PRICE_BASIS). Charts and metrics use adjusted closing prices, matching the total-return NAV above. Trade-day execution uses an adjusted open price (see build_adjusted_open()), kept consistent with the adjusted-close NAV rather than mixing in a raw open price.
PeriodDisplay: DailyMetrics use daily rowsDrawdown before downsample

WindowDisplay frequencyCalculation basis
YTD, 1Y, 2YDailyFull daily values
>2Y and <8YWeekly, last trading observation of weekFull daily values
≥8Y or SIMonthly, last trading observation of monthFull daily values

Dividend Income

Cash distributions calculated from exact daily shares in the NAV ledger. Yield on cost is intentionally not displayed — income grows with NAV. Prior Full-Year Income is the most comparable cross-period figure.
